channel.title: security on Macaroni OS
channel.description: Recent content in security on Macaroni OS

item.title: Copy Fail and Dirty Frag on Macaroni OS
item.description: A little detail about last security issues in Linux world and the impact in the Macaroni OS world. Copy Fail on Macaroni OS In the last period a lot of important CVEs (CVE-2026-31431, CVE-2026-43500, etc.) in the Linux world that have shaken all Linux distros. We speak about Copy Fail, Dirty Frag and derived exploits. We are surprised that an important mitigation strategy is not yet been shared and analyzed by the Macaroni OS Team.
